zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester於1112年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托時，他的父親Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester22歲，母親Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester22歲。他和Hawise de Reviers至少有1個女兒。他去世於1170年10月13日在英國英格蘭布里斯托享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester于1112年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托时，他的父亲Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester22岁，母亲Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester22岁。他和Hawise de Reviers至少有1个女儿。他去世于1170年10月13日在英国英格兰布里斯托享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester was born in 1112, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, was 22 and his mother, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, was 22. He had at least 1 daughter with Hawise de Reviers. He died on 13 October 1170, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester est né en 1112, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Hawise de Reviers. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1170, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester 1112 in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester 22 und seine Mutter Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester 22. Er hatte mit Hawise de Reviers mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1170 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester è nato il nel 1112 nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Hawise de Reviers. Morì il 13 ottobre 1170, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucesterが1112年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucesterは22歳，母Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucesterは22歳であった。彼はHawise de Reviersとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1170年10月13日にイギリスイギリスブリストルで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester(이)가 1112년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Hawise de Reviers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 10월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester nasceu em 1112, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Hawise de Reviers. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1170, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester родился в 1112 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, 22. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Hawise de Reviers. Он умер 13 октября 1170 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert FitzRobert Castellan Of Gloucester nació en 1112, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Hawise de Reviers. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1170, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
